zh.lifeSummary: 當John Kirton於大約1474年出生在英國米德萊可艾德蒙頓時，他的父親William Kirton25歲，母親Margery Milborne20歲。他於1499年與Margaret White在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希利法朗斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國米德萊可被列為justice of the peace 。他去世於1529年在英國英格蘭米德萊可艾德蒙頓享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kirton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kirton (Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, Suffolk), or Kirton in Lindsey (Lincolnshire). The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ (probably replacing Old English cirice ‘church’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Kirton was born about 1474, in Edmonton, Middlesex, England, his father, William Kirton, was 25 and his mother, Margery Milborne, was 20. He married Margaret White in 1499, in Hillfarrance, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as justice of the peace  in Middlesex, England. He died in 1529, in Edmonton, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Kirton est né environ 1474, à Edmonton, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Kirton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margery Milborne, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret White en 1499, à Hillfarrance, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace  à Middlesex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1529, à Edmonton, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Eng: Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Kirton um 1474 in Edmonton, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Kirton 25 und seine Mutter Margery Milborne 20. Er hat 1499 in Hillfarrance, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margaret White geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als justice of the peace  in Middlesex, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1529 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Edmonton, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Kirton è nato il circa 1474 nel Edmonton, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, William Kirton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margery Milborne, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret White nel 1499, nel Hillfarrance, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the peace  nel Middlesex, England. Morì nel 1529, nel Edmonton, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Kirtonが約1474年にイギリスミッドレセックスエドモントンで生まれた時，父William Kirtonは25歳，母Margery Milborneは20歳であった。1499年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトヒルファランスでMargaret Whiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスミッドレセックスでの職業はjustice of the peace と記録されている。彼は1529年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスエドモントンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Kirton(이)가 대략 1474년 영국 미들레세스 에드몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kirton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Milborne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 힐파랜스에서 Margaret White(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 미들레세스에서 justice of the peace 이었다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 에드몽에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Kirton nasceu aproximadamente 1474, em Edmonton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Kirton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margery Milborne, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret White em 1499, em Hillfarrance, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace  em Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1529, em Edmonton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ro.Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Eng: Thorpe Mandeville, Northamptonshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Kirton родился около 1474 г. в местности эдмонтон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Kirton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Milborne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret White в 1499 г. в местности хиллфарранс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии justice of the peace  в местности миддлесекс, Англия. Он умер в 1529 г. в местности эдмонтон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Kirton nació aproximadamente 1474, en Edmonton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Kirton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margery Milborne, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret White en 1499, en Hillfarrance, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace  en Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1529, en Edmonton, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
